title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 -  4 -  2017: Finished linking 1800s, doing Flicker  battles 1900s

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night vlog update from Boulder, describing his progress on a personal project linking Flickr photos and Google Earth battle sites across history. He finished the 1800s phase and is now working on the 1900s, with future plans to do castles, cathedrals, and eventually Rome. He briefly mentions listening to 'The Golden Ass' by Apuleius.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Very excited about the potential to make history feel vivid and real, like personal memory
Wants to finish something before moving on; especially eager to see the Rome project completed
Finds it interesting as the only fully intact surviving novel from Rome; plans to discuss it more later
